traits.name: Chimeric Creation
entries: The fox has fur that changes color to match its surroundings, giving it advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks.

traits.name: Keen Hearing
entries: The fox has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* 5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. *Hit:* 1 piercing damage.

traits.name: Immutable Form
entries: The Scarlet Sentinel is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The Scarlet Sentinel has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Magic Weapons
entries: The Scarlet Sentinel's weapon attacks are magical.

actions.name: Slam
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* 4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. *Hit:* 11 (2d8 + 2) bludgeoning damage.
